§6Certus Quartz Tools§f:
The §6Certus Quartz Tools §fare a §etier of tools §f crafted from §6Certus Quartz Crystals §f on §bwooden sticks§f. They are §6level §f (iron-equivalent) and have §bhigh mining speed §f on §6Certus Quartz Ore §f and §6stone §f blocks.

§6Production Path (tools/certus_quartz_pickaxe.json)§f:
Pattern "aaa / b / b" (the standard pickaxe shape):
- §ba§f: §6Certus Quartz Crystal §f(appliedenergistics2:material:2, the §6#crystalCertusQuartz §foredict tag covers any Certus Quartz variant) — 3
- §bb§f: §6Stick §f(stickWood) — 2
- Yields 1× Certus Quartz Pickaxe

The same recipe shape yields the rest of the tool family:
- §6Certus Quartz Axe§f (tools/certus_quartz_axe.json) — §b3 §f Certus + §b2 §f Sticks
- §6Certus Quartz Hoe§f (tools/certus_quartz_hoe.json) — §b2 §f Certus + §b2 §f Sticks
- §6Certus Quartz Shovel§f (tools/certus_quartz_spade.json) — §b1 §f Certus + §b2 §f Sticks
- §6Certus Quartz Sword§f (tools/certus_quartz_sword.json) — §b2 §f Certus + §b1 §f Stick
- §6Certus Quartz Cutting Knife§f (tools/certus_quartz_cutting_knife.json) — §b2 §f Certus + §b1 §f Stick
- §6Certus Quartz Wrench§f (tools/certus_quartz_wrench.json) — §b2 §f Certus + §b4 §f Sticks

§6Function§f:
- §bMining level §f: §6iron-equivalent §f — can mine §6iron ore §f, §6gold ore §f, §6redstone §f, §6diamond §f, and §6emerald §f
- §bDurability §f: §b250 §fuses per tool
- §bMining speed §f: §b6.0 §f on §6stone §f, §b8.0 §f on §6Certus Quartz Ore §f
- §bTool class §f: §6PICKAXE §f for pickaxe/axe/hoe/shovel; §6SWORD §f for sword; §6WRENCH §f for the wrench

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 0 items the Certus Quartz Tools are a component of, but they are referenced in 12 §6use sites §f across the mod pack. Common uses:
- §bCertus Quartz harvesting §f: harvest §6Certus Quartz Ore §f quickly
- §bQuartz Dust production §f: combine with a §6Macerator §f to produce §6Certus Quartz Dust §f
- §bWrench §f: the Certus Quartz Wrench is a §6functional §f alternative to the §6AE2 Wrench §f

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: Certus Quartz is §bnon-renewable §f in the §bearly §f game — use the §6Quartz Grindstone §f to multiply your Certus Quartz supply
- §eTip§f: the §6Certus Quartz Wrench §f can §6rotate §f AE2 blocks; pair it with a §6Network Tool §f for full setup work
- §cWarning§f: Certus Quartz Tools are §cinferior §f to §6Nether Quartz Tools §f in durability (250 vs 1561) — use them only for §6Certus Quartz mining §f
- §cWarning§f: the §6Cutting Knife §f does §cnot §f drop §6mob heads §f in this modpack
